finding: Prose (non-path) deliverables pass `tasks import` with only a mechanical-split warning, then make `taskflow close` fail with `ATM_TASKFLOW_CLOSE_COMMIT_BUNDLE_INCOMPLETE` because the bundle cannot map the deliverable to the direction lock; the only repair lane is an emergency-lease `tasks import --write --force`.
expectedBehavior: Import should fail closed (or normalize with an explicit diagnostic) when a deliverable is not a repo path, and a governed non-emergency metadata-repair lane should exist for claimed tasks whose card text needs correction.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-TEAM-0082 adds path-shaped deliverable validation, explicit normalization diagnostics when scope paths can repair prose deliverables, strict-mode fail-closed behavior, and regression coverage for CJK prose versus valid CJK paths.
